/usr/bin/ar qc libmvgal_core.a CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/api/mvgal_api.c.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/api/mvgal_log.c.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/daemon/gpu_manager.c.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/daemon/config.c.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/daemon/ipc.c.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/memory/memory.c.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/memory/dmabuf.c.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/memory/allocator.c.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/memory/sync.c.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/scheduler/scheduler.c.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/scheduler/load_balancer.c.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/scheduler/strategy/afr.c.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/scheduler/strategy/sfr.c.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/scheduler/strategy/task.c.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/scheduler/strategy/compute_offload.c.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/scheduler/strategy/hybrid.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libmvgal_core.a
